title: Background Music Demo
script:
This video demonstrates background music with auto-ducking.

[Visual: musician playing guitar in studio]
The music automatically gets quieter when the voiceover is speaking.

[Visual: audio mixing equipment in recording studio]
This is called auto-ducking, and it makes your videos sound professional.

[Visual: happy person listening to music with headphones]
Place your music file in input/bgm/ and reference it in your script.

[Visual: waveform visualization on screen]
The pipeline handles the rest.
